calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Having been notified that the plaintiff is deceased, the Court ordered the case dismissed. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2018 Continued To Feb-26-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Nils Rosenquest, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to FEB-26-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2018 Continued To Nov-20-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to NOV-20-2018 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2018 Continued To Sep-11-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appeareance. Self represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to SEP-11-2018 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
